label: Wenn man das Herz der 12 Sternzeichen aufschneidet – welche Farbe hat es?

results.title: Wenn man das Herz der 12 Sternzeichen aufschneidet – welche Farbe hat es?
results.svg: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg width="1080" height="1920" viewBox="0 0 1080 1920" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><defs><clipPath id="clip"><rect width="1080" height="1920"/></clipPath></defs><rect width="1080" height="1920" fill="#000000"/><g clip-path="url(#clip)"><text x="110" y="654" font-family="'Syne','DM Sans',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" xml:space="preserve">Wenn man das Herz</text><text x="110" y="788" font-family="'Syne','DM Sans',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" xml:space="preserve">der 12</text><text x="110" y="922" font-family="'Syne','DM Sans',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" xml:space="preserve">Sternzeichen</text><text x="110" y="1056" font-family="'Syne','DM Sans',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" xml:space="preserve">aufschneidet –</text><text x="110" y="1190" font-family="'Syne','DM Sans',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" xml:space="preserve">welche Farbe hat</text><text x="110" y="1324" font-family="'Syne','DM Sans',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="96" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" xml:space="preserve">es?</text></g></svg>
